metadata.job_summary: 12-month trainee program starting September 2026 to become a ship broker in dry-bulk maritime freight. Mix of classroom learning, practical client work, mentoring, and continuous assessments leading to broker certification.

research.company_mission: Trusted partner since 1975 as member of the Baltic Exchange Broker Panel, offering optimum service and value-added performance across all operations.
research.recent_news: Lightship Academy Class of 2026 gathered in Vouliagmeni, Greece for five-day bootcamp in September. Programme established as cornerstone of people development strategy.

resume.professional_summary: M&A analyst with track record in fast-paced, client-facing environments. Skilled in market analysis, financial modeling, and information processing across 10+ mandates. Demonstrated commercial aptitude through AIESEC (CHF 60K revenue) and entrepreneurial ventures. Seeking to apply hard-working mindset to Lightship Academy's ship broker training in dry-bulk maritime freight.
auraia_bullets: Executed deal processes in 3-person team across 7 mandates (sell-side, buy-side, debt advisory), managing client relationships, coordinating advisors, and negotiating terms for EUR 5M-50M transactions in healthcare, tech, and life sciences

Built financial models (LBO, DCF, comps, precedent transactions) and conducted market research to identify strategic buyers for cross-border deals spanning Europe, US, and Asia, processing information for client presentations and Board meetings

Led marketing materials production, maintained buyer universes, and coordinated data rooms across concurrent mandates, demonstrating multitasking and collaborative approach while training 2 interns in M&A practices
resume.rc_bullet: Worked with CEO on evaluating acquisition targets in France and Belgium, preparing investment memos with market analysis for 3 potential acquisitions (EUR 10M-30M), and conducted due diligence to assess synergies and value creation opportunities
resume.europ_bullet: Supported CFO on FP&A for CHF 50M+ subsidiary, building automated dashboards in Excel and PowerBI to track KPIs and perform variance analysis, and assisted in budget planning and forecasting for 5 business units, enhancing information processing
leadership_bullets: Finalist in McKinsey business case, presenting data-driven model to forecast market events using statistical arbitrage, showcasing analytical rigor and problem-solving under pressure

Led AIESEC's post-COVID financial recovery by sourcing corporate leads and negotiating partnerships, closing 3 deals generating CHF 60K annual revenue and demonstrating resilience and commercial drive
Founded Screeny.ai, an AI software for investment banks to identify acquirers, leading full-stack development and B2B sales outreach, with tool adopted by 3 firms reducing buyer search time by 90%
resume.courses: Derivatives, Investment and Portfolio Management, Corporate Governance and M&A
resume.skills: Financial modeling | Market analysis | Client management | Data processing | Negotiation

cover_letter.subject: **Subject:** Application for Lightship Academy Trainee Position
cover_letter.intro: Lightship's reputation for integrity and in-depth market knowledge, combined with your commitment to trust-based partnerships since 1975, aligns with my approach to client relationships in M&A. Your Academy's proven track record of developing brokers through practical client work and mentoring resonates with my experience thriving in fast-paced, collaborative environments where commercial aptitude and hard work drive results.
cover_letter.body_1: **Commercial Drive and Client-Facing Excellence** - In M&A, I managed relationships across 7 live mandates in a lean 3-person team, coordinating with clients, advisors, and counterparties through complex transaction lifecycles. At AIESEC, I closed 3 corporate partnerships generating CHF 60K annual revenue, demonstrating the commercial aptitude and negotiation skills essential for ship brokerage.
cover_letter.body_2: **Market Analysis and Information Processing** - I built financial models and conducted comprehensive market research to identify strategic buyers across Europe, US, and Asia. At Europ Assistance, I created automated dashboards to track KPIs and process complex financial data for senior management. These skills directly translate to analyzing market mechanisms, legal frameworks, and client reporting in dry-bulk freight markets.
cover_letter.body_3: **Collaborative Team Player with Resilience** - Working in a boutique M&A firm required multitasking across multiple concurrent mandates while training 2 interns, mirroring the collaborative buddy system at Lightship Academy. My track record shows resilience: leading AIESEC's post-COVID recovery and founding Screeny.ai demonstrates the ambitious, hard-working mindset needed to excel in your rigorous training program.
cover_letter.closing: I am eager to bring my analytical rigor, commercial drive, and collaborative approach to Lightship's September 2026 cohort. The opportunity to learn from your experienced brokers while contributing to client assignments aligns perfectly with my career goals in global trading markets. I look forward to discussing how I can contribute to your team.

email.subject: Application - Lightship Academy Trainee - Adrian Turion
email.body:
Dear Lightship Hiring Team,

Please find attached my resume and cover letter for the Lightship Academy Trainee position starting September 2026.

Lightship's reputation for integrity and trust-based partnerships since 1975 aligns with my approach to client relationships in M&A. Having managed deals across 7 live mandates and closed CHF 60K in corporate partnerships, I am eager to bring my commercial aptitude and collaborative mindset to your dry-bulk maritime freight training program.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

Best regards,
Adrian Turion
+41 77 262 37 96
turionadrian@gmail.com
